text: Darkness dominates my perception; the spaces are dim and almost empty. Barely lit emergency signs and hints of text on the wall make me feel like an intruder in a space meant for activity or learning, now silent and abandoned. There is an unease—the stillness is thick, and the silence accentuates my sense of isolation and alertness. Yet, I am also curious, drawn in by the mystery of these quiet rooms and what stories they might hold.
